prestazioni: Engine swap to a **LS9 (6.2L Supercharged V8, 638 HP)** from the CTS-V with a **Holley Dominator EFI** standalone ECU, retaining the 4T80-E transmission but reinforcing it with a **Sonnax Smart Shell** and **TransGo HD2 shift kit** for durability under increased torque

Forced induction upgrade using a **ProCharger F-1X supercharger** (12 psi boost) with a **custom intercooler core (VMP Racing 4-core, 3.5" thick)** and **ID1000 fuel injectors** paired with a **Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump** to support the LS9’s power goals

Suspension overhaul with **Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers (DTS-specific valving)** and **Hotchkis Sport Suspension sway bars (28mm front, 25mm rear)** to reduce body roll, complemented by **polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension full set)** for sharper handling
estetica: Custom **Rocket Bunny-inspired widebody kit (DTS-specific, 3" fender flares)** fabricated from carbon fiber with **dual-color paint (Black Cherry Metallic with Satin Graphite accents)** and **custom LED taillights (Lux Halo, sequential turn signals)**

Front end restomod with a **1970 Cadillac Eldorado grille (chrome mesh, custom billet surround)** and **HID projector headlights (Morimoto XB LED, 5500K)** with **DRL halos (Oracle Lighting, amber tint)** for a retro-futuristic look

Interior overhaul featuring **Recaro SR-7 seats (DTS-specific mounts, Alcantara/leather upholstery)** with **custom embroidered Cadillac crest headrests**, a **Momo Prototipo steering wheel (380mm, suede)**, and a **full digital dash (AEM CD-7, OLED display)** replacing the stock cluster
